data.hook_english: The Only Player To Do This
data.cta_english: Is Ronaldinho the most entertaining player ever? Comment below!

segments.voice_english: Only one player won the World Cup, Champions League, Copa Libertadores, and Ballon d'Or because his skills were magic.
segments.image_query: poor kid playing football on a dusty street at sunset
segments.subtitle_english: Only one player won the World Cup, Champions League, Copa Libertadores, and Ballon d'Or because his skills were magic.
segments.voice_hindi: केवल एक खिलाड़ी ने विश्व कप, चैंपियंस लीग, कोपा लिबर्टाडोरेस और बैलन डी'ओर जीता क्योंकि उसका कौशल जादुई था।

segments.voice_english: He grew up in Brazil with nothing, but he practiced amazing tricks and no-look passes on the streets every day.
segments.image_query: poor brazilian kid dribbling a worn-out football in a favela at sunset
segments.subtitle_english: He grew up in Brazil with nothing, but he practiced amazing tricks and no-look passes on the streets every day.
segments.voice_hindi: वह ब्राज़ील में पले-बढ़े और उनके पास कुछ भी नहीं था, लेकिन उन्होंने हर दिन सड़कों पर अद्भुत तरकीबें और नो-लुक पास का अभ्यास किया।

segments.voice_english: People called him "O Bruxo" because his incredible overhead kicks and free-kicks helped him win two FIFA World Player awards.
segments.image_query: Ronaldinho smiling and celebrating on the pitch in a yellow Brazil jersey
segments.subtitle_english: People called him "O Bruxo" because his incredible overhead kicks and free-kicks helped him win two FIFA World Player awards.
segments.voice_hindi: लोग उन्हें "ओ ब्रुक्सो" कहते थे क्योंकि उनके अविश्वसनीय ओवरहेड किक और फ्री-किक ने उन्हें दो फीफा वर्ल्ड प्लेयर पुरस्कार जीतने में मदद की थी।

segments.voice_english: His glorious prime ended years ago, but now the legendary Brazilian attacker surprisingly plays for Serie C side Ravenna.
segments.subtitle_english: His glorious prime ended years ago, but now the legendary Brazilian attacker surprisingly plays for Serie C side Ravenna.
segments.voice_hindi: उनका शानदार कार्यकाल वर्षों पहले समाप्त हो गया था, लेकिन अब महान ब्राजीलियाई हमलावर आश्चर्यजनक रूप से सीरी सी टीम रेवेना के लिए खेलते हैं।

segments.voice_english: No other star ever copied his six historic trophies, so his unique name remains the ultimate definition of football magic.
segments.image_query: Ronaldinho holding the Ballon d'Or trophy smiling
segments.subtitle_english: No other star ever copied his 6 historic trophies, so his unique name remains the ultimate definition of football magic.
segments.voice_hindi: किसी अन्य स्टार ने कभी भी उनकी छह ऐतिहासिक ट्रॉफियों की नकल नहीं की, इसलिए उनका अनोखा नाम फुटबॉल जादू की अंतिम परिभाषा बना हुआ है।

data.youtube_title: Ronaldinho ka Magic Secret: Sabse Alag Kyun Tha? 🤯
title_options: Ronaldinho ka Magic Secret: Sabse Alag Kyun Tha? 🤯
Ronaldinho: Ek Akela Player jisne Sab Kuch Jeeta! 🏆
Ronaldinho "O Bruxo" Kaise Bana? Gali Se Goal Tak 🇧🇷
data.description: Ronaldinho ko log "O Bruxo" yaani jadugar aise hi nahi kehte! 🧙‍♂️ Brazil ki galiyon se nikal kar, unhone World Cup, Champions League aur Ballon d'Or sab apne magical tricks se jeeta. Kya aapko lagta hai Ronaldinho se bada koi dribbler football me aaya hai? Comment me batao! 👇
